title: Aura Trend Momentum [Pineify]
author: Pineify
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Aura Trend Momentum [Pineify] by Pineify.

``` Aura Trend Momentum - Advanced Double-Smoothed Oscillator with Gradient Visualization The Aura Trend Momentum indicator is a sophisticated momentum oscillator that combines double exponential smoothing with normalized momentum calculations to provide clear, noise-filtered trend signals.
